name: Anyone (Not Protected)
description: Use this classification to identify Confidential data that can be shared with approved parties outside the Organization; no encryption is applied.
tooltip: Use this classification to identify Confidential data that can be shared with approved parties outside the Organization; no encryption is applied.

parent.name: Confidential
parent.description: Use this classification to identify and protect data which is sensitive, and which should be shared more carefully.
parent.tooltip: Use this classification to identify and protect data which is sensitive, and which should be shared more carefully.
